channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: John Bolton Reaches Plea Deal on Classified Documents Charges
item.description: Former national security adviser John Bolton has reached a plea agreement with federal prosecutors and is set to plead guilty to one count of illegal retention of sensitive national security documents...

item.title: Leaked communications suggest King Charles had concerns about hosting Trump's 2025 UK state visit due to Ukraine-related tensions
item.description: A report by The i Paper, cited by Raw Story, alleges that King Charles III privately expressed reservations about hosting U.S. President Donald Trump during a state visit to the United Kingdom in 2025...

item.title: Tech-Backed Candidates Suffer Major Defeats in 2026 Primary Elections
item.description: A report highlighted the poor performance of several candidates backed by wealthy technology executives and investors during the 2026 U.S. primary elections. Despite receiving substantial financial su...

item.title: Analysis Suggests Amy Coney Barrett May Support Broad Limits on Federal Court Challenges to Executive Actions
item.description: A Raw Story report highlights an analysis by Georgetown University law professor Steve Vladeck regarding a recent Supreme Court case, Margolin v. National Association of Immigration Judges. Although t...

item.title: Nick Anderson Editorial Cartoon Examines MAGA Politics Through a UFC-Inspired Metaphor
item.description: This Raw Story piece is not a traditional news report but an opinion feature centered on an editorial cartoon by Pulitzer Prize-winning cartoonist Nick Anderson. Published in Raw Story's opinion secti...

item.title: Escalating Geopolitical Tensions in the Baltic Sea Region Between NATO and Russia
item.description: The Baltic Sea region is currently viewed by security experts as one of the highest-risk areas for potential direct conflict between NATO and Russia. The article highlights how NATO's eastward expansi...

item.title: Legal Analyst Says Revised DOJ Indictment Against SPLC Still Fails to Address Core Fraud Allegations
item.description: A new superseding indictment filed by the U.S. Department of Justice against the Southern Poverty Law Center (SPLC) has drawn criticism from national security journalist Marcy Wheeler, who argues that...

item.title: Conservative Figures Clash Over Candace Owens' Participation in Russian Economic Forum
item.description: Conservative commentator Candace Owens has become the center of a dispute within right-wing political circles after appearing at the St. Petersburg International Economic Forum in Russia. Owens attend...

item.title: US House Approves Resolution Seeking Congressional Oversight of Military Action Against Iran
item.description: The United States House of Representatives approved a war powers resolution intended to limit President Donald Trump’s ability to continue military operations against Iran without explicit authorizati...

item.title: Ohio Senate Republicans Advance Voter ID Constitutional Amendment Despite Internal Party Criticism
item.description: Ohio Senate Republicans successfully passed Senate Joint Resolution 10 on Wednesday, aiming to enshrine a photo voter ID requirement into the state constitution. The measure passed by a 22-9 vote, mov...

item.title: Rare Photos Highlight Angelina Jolie’s Teenage Years and Early Path to Stardom
item.description: Vintage Everyday published a collection of candid photographs showing Angelina Jolie during her teenage years in the late 1980s and early 1990s, offering a look at the period before she became a globa...

item.title: Joyce Vance Warns Democrats to Increase Voter Mobilization After Supreme Court Decision on Alabama Redistricting
item.description: The article discusses a reaction from former federal prosecutor Joyce Vance to a recent U.S. Supreme Court decision that allowed Alabama to use a congressional map despite lower federal court findings...

item.title: House Vote Limiting Trump's Iran War Powers Signals Growing Republican Dissent
item.description: A resolution passed by the U.S. House of Representatives has emerged as one of the most significant congressional rebukes of President Donald Trump's administration. The measure, approved by a 215-208...

item.title: Understanding Stochastic Gradient Descent in PyTorch Through a Linear Regression Example
item.description: This article explains how PyTorch uses Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) to train machine learning models by minimizing prediction error. The author introduces a simple linear regression model defined...

item.title: Former Trump Administration Staffer Says Kaitlan Collins Was One of the Most Challenging Reporters for White House Officials
item.description: A former White House staff member from Donald Trump's first administration said that CNN journalist Kaitlan Collins was regarded as one of the most difficult reporters for the administration to handle...

item.title: Trump Criticizes Four House Republicans After War Powers Resolution on Iran Passes
item.description: President Donald Trump strongly criticized four Republican members of the U.S. House of Representatives after they joined Democrats in supporting a war powers resolution related to U.S. involvement wi...

item.title: Scott Pelley Departs ‘60 Minutes’ Following Dispute With Executive Producer Nick Bilton
item.description: Veteran journalist and longtime ‘60 Minutes’ correspondent Scott Pelley was dismissed from the CBS newsmagazine program following a confrontation with the show's newly appointed executive producer, Ni...

item.title: Staff Departures and Editorial Disputes Raise Concerns About the Future of CBS's 60 Minutes
item.description: A report highlighted growing turmoil at CBS News and its potential impact on the long-running television news program '60 Minutes.' The controversy follows major staffing changes that reportedly reduc...

item.title: Trump Alleges Election Irregularities in California Primary Vote Count During Early-Morning Posts
item.description: President Donald Trump posted a series of messages on Truth Social early Thursday morning criticizing the pace of vote counting in California's primary elections. In posts published shortly after 1 a....

item.title: A Look Back at Gloria Paul’s Career and Legacy in Italian Popular Cinema
item.description: The article celebrates the life and career of Gloria Paul, a British-born actress, singer, and dancer who became a recognizable figure in Italian popular cinema during the 1960s and 1970s. Known for h...
